name: Nguyễn Văn Thắng
title: About Me
bio1: I'm a passionate AI/ML Engineer & Full Stack Developer from Vietnam with a deep love for building impactful digital experiences. I thrive at the intersection of AI and modern web technologies.
bio2: With expertise spanning React, TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure, I craft scalable applications that solve real-world problems — from AI-powered tools to social platforms and EV infrastructure systems.
bio3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new tech, contributing to open source, or diving into the latest AI research. I believe in writing clean code, continuous learning, and building products that make a difference.
